titleStmt.title: SII 40.202: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 202. (A.R. No. B. 214 of 1932.) Punganūr, Punganur Taluk, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On the west and south walls of the Śiva temple near the tank.
This is dated Śaka 1738, Dhātu, Māgha śu. 15.
Records the renovations made to the shrine of the goddess in the temple of Jagadīśvara and construction of the Śikharam in the shrine of Hanumān by Mummaḍi-Chikkarāya, son of Dēvīrammaṇi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1738 Agunani
yaḍi dhātu saṁ . māgha śu 15 lu yī Aṁmmavāri śikhara
mu mukhamaṁṭṭapamu mahadvāramu jagadīśvara pritigā .
marā . suguṭūru yiṁmmaḍi cikkarāyalavāri puṁṇyastrī
vūlapāṭi raṁggagavuṇi vāri kumā¨rtelagu dēvīraṁmma
ṁṇnigāri putrulaina muṁmmaḍi cikkarāyalavāru
hanumaṁttarāyasvāmivāri śikharaṁ kōnēṭiki paścimaṁ
kalyāṇamaṁṭṭapaṁ mīda śikharaṁ kaṭṭiṁccinadi
ma . rā . muṁmmaḍi cikkarāyalavāru satraṁ pani yōgū
dā yī dēvasthānānaku vajragāra ceyiṁcci vimānaṁ
kaṭṭiṁccināru
Digital edition of SII 40.202 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
